name: A664CloseProxyPort
title: A664CloseProxyPort
description: Method to close a specific socket port, which was generated using a664InitProxyPort.
This call is only required, if an existing message-pair or UDP-port combination needs to be modified.
On measurement end all existing proxy-ports are closed automatically.

parameters.name: <channel>
parameters.description: AFDX-channel (1 to 16) to which socket packets should be mapped to (sent and observed)
